density.label: Topic density
density.hint: How semantically close the topic's documents are to each other: the denser, the more uniform the topic. Computed from document vectors, with no AI involved.

lineage.merged: The topic was formed by merging {{count}} previous topics during the last knowledge-base update
lineage.split: The topic split off from a larger topic during a knowledge-base update
lineage.unchanged: The topic's composition has not changed since the last knowledge-base update
lineage.continues: The topic continues a previous one: composition matches by {{percent}} %
